class.name: GameInputActionMap
class.brief_description: Serializable list of [GameInputBinding] rows consumed by [GameInputMapper].
class.description: [GameInputActionMap] is a [Resource] that owns an ordered, typed array of [GameInputBinding]. Edit it in the inspector or build it in code, save and load via [code]ResourceSaver[/code] / [code]ResourceLoader[/code], and assign it to [member GameInputMapper.action_map] to drive Godot actions from GameInput. Mutations through [method add_binding] and [method clear] emit [code]changed[/code] (inherited from [Resource]), so a [GameInputMapper] referencing the action map can react to live edits in the editor.

method.name: get_bindings
method.description: Returns the underlying typed array of [GameInputBinding]. See [member bindings].

method.name: set_bindings
method.description: Replaces the entire binding list. The argument should be a typed [code]Array[GameInputBinding][/code]; non-binding entries are silently kept by Godot's typed-array machinery but ignored at runtime. See [member bindings].

method.name: get_binding_count
method.description: Returns the number of bindings in the map. Equivalent to [code]bindings.size()[/code].

method.name: get_binding
method.description: Returns the binding at [param index], or [code]null[/code] if [param index] is out of range. Indexing is stable; [GameInputMapper] uses these indices as the keys for its per-binding "previously pressed" state.

method.name: add_binding
method.description: Appends [param binding] to the map. Null arguments are silently ignored. Emits [code]changed[/code] on success.

method.name: clear
method.description: Removes every binding from the map. Emits [code]changed[/code].

members.member: Typed [code]Array[GameInputBinding][/code] of rows iterated each frame by [GameInputMapper]. The inspector exposes this as a typed-resource array so you can drag [GameInputBinding] resources directly into it.
